title: 3D scene slice
description: Author mesh, light, and camera; Play uses world_draw3d.

steps.caption: Add a mesh
steps.narration: Create an entity. Enable Transform3D and Mesh3D in the Inspector. Choose box with a size, or glTF and pick an assets path. Optionally set a color tint.

steps.caption: Light and camera
steps.narration: Enable Light3D — directional or point — and Camera3D with orbit yaw, pitch, and distance. Hierarchy badges show mesh, light, and cam3d so you can spot the setup quickly.

steps.caption: Write world_draw3d
steps.narration: In main, call scene3d_init and world_create. In frame, call world_step then world_draw3d with your camera handle. Play re-applies the editor scene after world_create and materializes GPU handles.

steps.caption: Play on WebGPU
steps.narration: Click Play. Scenes with 3D components auto-switch to WebGPU preview. You should see authored boxes or glTF meshes lit in the scene view. Switch back to Edit to restore the snapshot.
